nta.declaration: clock cl; int temp; const int a = 2015; const int b = 2040; const int c = 2064; const int d = 2088; const int e = 2112; const int f = 2137; const int g = 2161; const int h = 2186; const int i = 2210; const int j = 2234; const int k = 2258; const int l = 2283; const int m = 2307; const int n = 2332; const int o = 2356;
